title: Bookmark
description: A single bookmark entry in the Dockmarks JSON feed. Matches the Bookmark interface in src/shared/types.ts.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Must be unique across the entire feed.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the extension UI.

url.description: The canonical URL the bookmark opens. Must be absolute (http or https).

description.description: One-sentence description of what the tool does. Present tense, max 80 characters.
examples: Source control, pull requests, and developer collaboration.
Container registry for images, teams, and pipelines.

logo.description: Logo URL using the Google Favicon API at sz=128. Must use the root domain only.

section.description: Category in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE. Established values: ENGINEERING, COLLABORATION, TELEMETRY, SECURITY, CLOUD, DATA.

tags.description: 2-4 lowercase kebab-case strings for search and filtering.
